name: Work Shirt
description: Black button-up work shirt with the society seal embroidered at the pocket. Hard-wearing and brew-day ready.
alt: Black button-up work shirt with the PFS seal embroidered at the chest pocket

name: Black T-Shirt
description: Soft black tee with the society logo on the chest. An easy everyday layer for the well-fermented.
alt: Black t-shirt with the PFS logo printed on the chest

name: Pullover Hoodie
description: Grey pullover hoodie with the society logo — the warm layer for cellar temps and cold-morning brew days.
alt: Grey pullover hoodie with the PFS logo on the chest

name: Cap
description: Grey-green front panel with the society logo and a breathable off-white mesh back. Adjustable one-size fit.
alt: Grey-green front cap with the PFS logo and an off-white mesh back
